# Differentiation

**Summary**: The process by which magma changes in composition as it cools and crystallizes.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] analyzed the magma differentiation trend for the granites using Sr, Nd, and Pb isotopes.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] Determining the source and evolution of the granitic rocks.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] isotope ratio analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The horizontal trends of 143Nd/144Nd(i) ratios with SiO2 demonstrated the magma differentiation trend. ([[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024, p. 75]])
